name: Creating review widgets to collect and promote customer reviews with Synup
body_para:
Online reviews play a crucial role in consumers' decision-making process. By prominently featuring positive reviews on your website, you're not only showcasing your satisfied customers but also subtly encouraging new visitors to become customers themselves.

With Synup's user-friendly interface, you can create and customize review widgets in just a few clicks. No coding required! Whether you want to highlight reviews from Google, Facebook, or industry-specific platforms, Synup has got you covered.

‍

How does a review widget help?

‍Review widgets are game-changers for your online presence. They serve multiple purposes:

  • Social Proof: Displaying authentic customer reviews builds trust and credibility with potential customers.
  • Increased Conversions: Positive reviews can significantly boost your conversion rates by addressing potential customers' doubts and concerns.
  • SEO Benefits: Fresh, user-generated content in the form of reviews can improve your website's SEO performance.
  • Feedback Collection: Review widgets make it easy for customers to leave new reviews, helping you gather more valuable feedback.
  • Brand Reputation: Showcasing positive reviews helps reinforce your brand's positive image and reputation.

By leveraging Synup's review widgets, you're not just displaying reviews – you're strategically enhancing your online presence and customer trust

Create review widgets with Synup 

Creating a review widget with Synup is a breeze. Follow these simple steps to get your widget up and running:

Step 1: Navigate to the "Reviews" tab and select "Review Widgets" > “Create a New Widget”

Step 2: You’ll be taken to the widget form where you can add your widget name, customize the widget as per number of reviews, size, star ratings, and also select the sources you want to fetch reviews from

Step 3: Once your widget is created, you’ll have the option to edit or install it. To install the widget, on your website, click on the install button.

Step 4: Add the custom script to your website. Now your customers can simply write new reviews for you using the green button. The widget will display all your newest reviews.

Create review widgets to build your reputation

By implementing Synup's review widgets, you're taking a proactive approach to managing and showcasing your online reputation. These widgets serve as a constant reminder of your business's quality and customer satisfaction.

Moreover, by making it easy for customers to leave new reviews directly through the widget, you're encouraging a steady stream of fresh feedback. This not only helps potential customers make informed decisions but also provides you with valuable insights into your business performance.

Remember, in the digital age, your online reputation is often the first impression potential customers have of your business. Make it count with Synup's review widgets!

New to Synup? Book a demo to see it all in action
use_case_summary: Are you looking for an effortless way to showcase your glowing customer reviews and encourage more feedback? Look no further than Synup's review widgets! These powerful tools allow you to display your best reviews directly on your website, boosting credibility and trust with potential customers.
